name_en: M81153 Blue New Aerogram Brazza Wallet Emphasizing the delicate texture of grained calfskin, with a low-key metal letter brand stamp. Compartments and card slots hold cash, documents, and coins, matching the Aerogram series handbags. Dimensions: 10 x 19 x 2 cm
